perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement shall be for one (1) year commencing on the Effective Date and ending on February 19, 2013 ("Term").
perturbation.changed_text: The initial term of this Agreement shall be for one (1) year commencing on the Effective Date and ending on February 19, 2013 ("Term"), unless terminated earlier as outlined in Paragraph 10. The Agreement shall automatically renew for subsequent one-year terms unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 30 days prior to the end of the then-current term. In any event, the agreement term shall not extend beyond five (5) years from the Effective Date.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces ambiguity concerning the term of the agreement. Originally, the term was clearly defined as one year. However, the modified text introduces an automatic renewal clause alongside a maximum five-year term, creating a contradiction. Paragraph 10 dictates termination, but this is about early termination and this new term states the agreement will be automatically renewed. This contradicts the original set 1 year term and impacts clauses that rely on a fixed annual term. Now the term is up to 5 years.
perturbation.contradicted_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in Paragraphs 9 and 10, HDS shall have the right to use the name, image, likeness, characterization, visual and audio representation of Celebrity ("Celebrity Attributes") in connection with HDS' product, Clotamin, in the Territory as follows: A. In a television commercial (specific spot length to be mutually agreed upon) promoting Clotamin ("Commercial") aired specifically in the following three (3) television markets: (1) Washington, DC Metro Area; (2) Florida; and (3) Texas (collectively "Markets"); B. On HDS' website (www.clotamin.corn) ("Website"); and C. In Clotamin-related press releases. D. In connection with any HDS' usage of Celebrity Attributes as outlined above in Paragraphs 3(A)-(C), HDS will feature the following disclaimer in close proximity to said usage: "PAUL SILAS IS NOT A MEDICAL AUTHORITY. THESE STATEMENTS HAVE NOT BEEN EVALUATED BY THE FOOD AND DRUG ADMINISTRATION. THIS PRODUCT IS NOT INTENDED TO DIAGNOSE, TREAT, CURE OR PREVENT ANY DISEASE."
perturbation.justification: The original agreement term was fixed at one year. The modified text introduces an automatic renewal for subsequent one-year terms, but limits it to a maximum of five years and allows for early termination. This contradicts the original fixed one-year term because the contract can now last up to five years. This change impacts Paragraph 3 as the terms outlined within it are now applicable for up to five years rather than the original 1 year. This is a clear example of 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction' as the term is not consistently defined.

perturbation.original_text: A. Upon request by HDS, one (1) production session to be used for the production of the Commercial ("Production Session"). The location, date and time of the Production Session shall be mutually agreed upon by Celebrity and HDS. In the event the Production Session exceeds eight (8) hours in duration HDS and Celebrity will negotiate in good faith additional compensation to Celebrity for time in excess of eight (8) hours.
perturbation.changed_text: A. Upon request by HDS, one (1) production session to be used for the production of the Commercial ("Production Session"). The location, date and time of the Production Session shall be at HDS' sole discretion. In the event the Production Session exceeds eight (8) hours in duration, no additional compensation will be provided to Celebrity.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the date, time and location shall be mutually agreed. The change now states that location, date and time will be at HDS' sole discretion and also no additional compensation will be provided, contradicting the original statement that good faith negotiations would be held. The conflicting statement of having 'mutually agreed upon' against 'sole discretion' creates an in-text conflict, because the original text gave the celebrity a negotiation power. This impacts the Celebrity's rights as outlined in Paragraph 4.
perturbation.contradicted_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in Paragraphs 9 and 10, Celebrity agrees to provide HDS with the following: A. Upon request by HDS, one (1) production session to be used for the production of the Commercial ("Production Session"). The location, date and time of the Production Session shall be at HDS' sole discretion. In the event the Production Session exceeds eight (8) hours in duration, no additional compensation will be provided to Celebrity. Source: PHARMAGEN, INC., 8-K/A, 8/3/2012 B. Celebrity will serve as a member of the Clotamin/HDS Board of Advisors, whose members' sole responsibility is to be listed as a Clotamin brand ambassador on the Website and/or Clotamin related press releases. With respect to the Board of Advisors, Celebrity will not be responsible for any additional services such as attending meetings, corporate functions, etc. C. HDS may request an additional production session(s), or a media tour or personal appearance(s) for an additional fee to be mutually agreed upon by the parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the location, date, and time of the Production Session shall be mutually agreed upon by Celebrity and HDS, giving the Celebrity negotiation power and rights over the conditions of the session. The modified text changes this by stating the location, date, and time of the Production Session shall be at HDS's sole discretion, removing the Celebrity's negotiation power. Also the modified text states that no additional compensation will be provided to the Celebrity, contradicting the original statement that good faith negotiations would be held. Because this falls under the Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction definition by contradicting each other and creating an in-text conflict, there is a contradiction.
